title: Replace Process.sleep with assert_receive
prompt: Rewrite a test snippet at `test/my_app/worker_test.exs` that currently uses `Process.sleep(200)` to wait for a background worker to finish. Replace the sleep with `assert_receive({:worker_done, _result}, 1_000)` — the worker is assumed to send the calling process a `{:worker_done, result}` message on completion. Remove the Process.sleep entirely.
tier_rationale: Iron Law pattern swap. Named in the plugin's iron-law catalog as a top Claude failure.
research_citation: "No Process.sleep" ... "Use `assert_receive` with timeout for async operations" — oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix testing SKILL.md Iron Law
